title: PaginatedResponse
description: Standard paginated response shape for any list endpoint (Skill 09 - advanced-querying)

data.description: Array of items for the current page.

total.description: Total number of records matching the active filters

page.description: Current page number using the convention chosen by the API

limit.description: Number of items requested per page after normalization and max-limit enforcement

totalPages.description: Optional total page count when the API chooses to expose it

hasNext.description: Optional navigation hint indicating whether another page exists

hasPrevious.description: Optional navigation hint indicating whether a previous page exists
